Hearing Re Motion For Issue, Evidence And Monetary Sanctions - Parties Notifed Telephonically By Clerk. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: J. Rios Merida. (504)
Off Calendar Sep-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RICK BELGARDE'S MOTION FOR ISSUE, EVIDENCE AND MONETARY SANCTIONS

Appearances:
Mengmeng Zhang of Bogaards Davis LLP (415.979.0480) for plaintiff and responding party; Phillip Seltzer of Rubinstein Law (415.967.1970) for defendant and moving party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Granted in part. Plaintiff may not rely on or refer to documents not produced by September 11, 2013. Plaintiff and his counsel must pay sanctions of $10,350 pursuant to CCP section 2023.030(a). In light of Plaintiff having finally produced documents, the Court will not impose issue sanctions. Further, the Court notes that the final Bogaards lease has been produced in court. Plaintiff is ordered to provide legible copies of the Quickbook screen shots that were previously produced and their electronic files by September 25, 2013. If this is not done, plaintiff cannot refer to or rely on those documents at trial. The Court will not order a continuance of the trial. This is without prejudice to counsel seeking that relief before the Presiding Judge. Mr. Seltzer is directed to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maggie Collins, CSR #3117 of Collins & Associates (415.883.1009)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Issue, Evidence, And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-13-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RICK BELGARDE's Motion For Issue, Evidence, And Monetary Sanctions - This motion will be heard by Judge Busch in Department 504. Counsel are to meet and confer and contact Judge Busch's clerk at 415-551-3772 to schedule a hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this discovery hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
